authored_against: the approved reframe design (v12) + its three implementation conditions
NOT_attributed_to: the legacy implementation. These are AUTHORED EXPECTATIONS, not observed history. The legacy resolver cannot emit an attempt, an applicability flag, a required-for-centering flag, a failure event, a negative result, a degraded list, or a strategy-scoped event chain — every one of those is an invention of this design. Recording them under a legacy SHA would be the design certifying itself, so they live here, plainly labelled, and are validated against the SPEC.

expectations.why: The detector RAN TO COMPLETION and found no face. That is a conclusion, not a failure.
The clip is centred because the TOOLCHAIN was broken. Nothing observed an empty room.
ffmpeg ran CLEAN and wrote nothing. Today that is the same bare [] as an absent binary.
C-1. No strategy had started. Reusing strategy_raised here would name a strategy that never ran — a fabricated attribution.
A producer lock we could not take is actionable and distinct from a generic blowup.
speaker_track did not conclude 'no 2-shot' — it BLEW UP. A centre it did not license is not defensible.

E3. A real 2-shot with no clean track is CONSERVATIVELY CENTRED (both seats), never a one-person static lock that crops the other speaker out. A COMPLETED-with-a-negative is NOT failure, so this is a LEGITIMATE centre — but a distinct one (centered_multi_untracked), and subject_focus is not part of the MULTI route so only speaker_track runs.

E3. A MULTI whose track HARD-FAILS is UNRESOLVED — it no longer falls to a degraded one-person lock (the pilot's 'empty seat'). subject_focus is not run; the failed required track pins the outcome, and the centre we return is not defensible (a broken toolchain never licenses a centre).
CT_NOPEOPLE routes to saliency. The centre is only defensible once saliency ALSO completes.

C-2 / D9. A 2-tuple focus carries no face height, so nothing zooms. The guard is THIS tuple assertion and the Layer-1 vector — NOT the fingerprint golden, which cannot see the change: _render_fingerprint gates `ct` behind `geom`, and geom is False for a 2-tuple.
A None nobody explained is a FAILURE, not an empty room.
The strategies fail OPEN — they return None NORMALLY after a hard failure, and may record a negative on the way out. Completion is decided by the EVIDENCE, never by the fact of returning.
